chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 141 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 05.03.2026 Petitioner Abdul Latif Korejo is present in person. Ms. Shazia Hinjrah, DAG. ------------------------------------ Petitioner Abdul Latif Korejo present in person, submits that his counsel on account of illness is not in attendance today. He submits that he has submitted a representation dated 02.10.2025 (annexure P-2, page 23 to 27 of Court file) for compliance of order dated 24.10.2013 passed in C.P. No. D-2232 of 2013, which is still pending adjudication before respondent Nos.1 and 2 and he will be satisfied and not press instant petition if the said representation is decided by respondent Nos. 1 and 2 within the shortest possible time. Learned DAG accorded his no objection to the disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition in view of the above, is hereby disposed of along with pending application, if any, with direction to respondent Nos.1 and 2 to decide the fate of the representation dated 02.10.2025 submitted by the petitioner before them. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order along with annexure P-2, page 23 to 27 of Court file to respondent Nos. 1 and 2 for compliance. Upon receipt of the same, respondent Nos. 1 and 2 shall decide the fate of the representation within two months’ time after providing equal opportunity of hearing to all concerned. The petition along with pending application, if any, is disposed of in the above terms.

Upon receipt of the same, respondent Nos. 1 and 2 shall decide the fate of the representation within two months’ time after providing equal opportunity of hearing to all concerned. The petition along with pending application, if any, is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
